channel.title: GitHub Svelte Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: leaningtech/webvm
item.description: Virtual Machine for the Web

item.title: taikoxyz/taiko-mono
item.description: A based rollup. 🥁 🌸

item.title: vkurko/calendar
item.description: Full-sized drag & drop JavaScript event calendar with resource & timeline views

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: skeletonlabs/skeleton
item.description: A complete design system and component solution, built on Tailwind.

item.title: matt8707/ha-fusion
item.description: A modern, easy-to-use and performant custom Home Assistant dashboard

item.title: codicocodes/dotfyle
item.description: Find the best Neovim plugins

item.title: cupcakearmy/cryptgeon
item.description: cryptgeon is a secure, open source note / file sharing service inspired by PrivNote written in rust & svelte.

item.title: Niek/chatgpt-web
item.description: ChatGPT web interface using the OpenAI API

item.title: huntabyte/shadcn-svelte
item.description: shadcn/ui, but for Svelte. ✨

item.title: seanmorley15/AdventureLog
item.description: Self-hostable travel tracker and trip planner.

item.title: basharovV/musicat
item.description: A sleek desktop music player and tagger for offline music 🪕. With gapless playback, smart playlists, and a map view! Built with Svelte and Tauri

item.title: ThaUnknown/miru
item.description: Bittorrent streaming software for cats. Stream anime torrents, real-time with no waiting for downloads.

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte
item.description: Official Svelte components built for Flowbite and Tailwind CSS

item.title: primocms/primo
item.description: Primo is a visual CMS with a built-in code editor, Svelte blocks, and static site generator.

item.title: sparrowapp-dev/sparrow-app
item.description: Your next-gen API testing and development tool.

item.title: ChurchApps/FreeShow
item.description: FreeShow is a free and open-source, user-friendly presenter software.

item.title: hackclub/OnBoard
item.description: 💡 Join 1,000 teenagers and make your first PCB with a $100 grant!
